mypaintr 0.0.1
  • Reference
    • Hand Demo
    • Introduction to mypaintr

Compute or draw a rough rectangle

Source: R/draw-rough.R
rough_rect.Rd

Compute or draw a rough rectangle

Usage

rough_rect(x0, y0, x1, y1, hand = NULL)

draw_rough_rect(
  x0,
  y0,
  x1,
  y1,
  hand = NULL,
  col = NA,
  border = graphics::par("fg"),
  fill_pattern = NULL,
  ...
)

Arguments

x0, y0

Rectangle corner.

x1, y1

Opposite rectangle corner.

hand

Hand-drawn geometry settings created with hand().

col

Fill colour. When visible and fill_pattern is NULL, a solid fill is drawn.

border

Border colour.

fill_pattern

Optional fill pattern created with hatch(), crosshatch(), zigzag(), or jumble().

...

Graphics parameters passed to graphics::lines().

Value

A list with x and y components containing a roughened closed outline suitable for plotting with graphics::lines().

See also

Other rough drawing helpers: rough_arrows(), rough_lines(), rough_points(), rough_polygons(), rough_polypath(), rough_segments()

Examples

rough_rect(2, 2, 5, 6)
#> $x
#>   [1] 2.000000 2.085714 2.171429 2.257143 2.342857 2.428571 2.514286 2.600000
#>   [9] 2.685714 2.771429 2.857143 2.942857 3.028571 3.114286 3.200000 3.285714
#>  [17] 3.371429 3.457143 3.542857 3.628571 3.714286 3.800000 3.885714 3.971429
#>  [25] 4.057143 4.142857 4.228571 4.314286 4.400000 4.485714 4.571429 4.657143
#>  [33] 4.742857 4.828571 4.914286 5.000000 4.999020 4.997951 4.996798 4.995568
#>  [41] 4.994267 4.992904 4.991487 4.990024 4.988525 4.987000 4.985460 4.983915
#>  [49] 4.982377 4.980858 4.979368 4.978880 4.979545 4.980387 4.981390 4.982537
#>  [57] 4.983810 4.985189 4.986655 4.988187 4.989765 4.991368 4.992975 4.994567
#>  [65] 4.996122 4.997621 4.999044 4.998440 4.997859 4.997352 4.996926 4.996590
#>  [73] 4.996348 4.996208 4.996173 4.996249 4.996437 4.996741 4.997162 4.997699
#>  [81] 4.998353 4.999121 5.000000 4.914286 4.828571 4.742857 4.657143 4.571429
#>  [89] 4.485714 4.400000 4.314286 4.228571 4.142857 4.057143 3.971429 3.885714
#>  [97] 3.800000 3.714286 3.628571 3.542857 3.457143 3.371429 3.285714 3.200000
#> [105] 3.114286 3.028571 2.942857 2.857143 2.771429 2.685714 2.600000 2.514286
#> [113] 2.428571 2.342857 2.257143 2.171429 2.085714 2.000000 1.996787 1.993687
#> [121] 1.990711 1.987873 1.985183 1.982651 1.980288 1.978099 1.976092 1.974273
#> [129] 1.972646 1.971213 1.969977 1.968937 1.968095 1.966683 1.964588 1.962593
#> [137] 1.960714 1.958969 1.957375 1.955948 1.954704 1.953658 1.952823 1.952213
#> [145] 1.951839 1.951713 1.951845 1.952241 1.952910 1.954974 1.957240 1.959674
#> [153] 1.962261 1.964988 1.967841 1.970806 1.973868 1.977011 1.980220 1.983481
#> [161] 1.986776 1.990091 1.993410 1.996718 2.000000
#> 
#> $y
#>   [1] 2.000000 2.003469 2.007148 2.011003 2.015000 2.019098 2.023257 2.027433
#>   [9] 2.031581 2.035654 2.039605 2.043384 2.045568 2.045606 2.045126 2.044163
#>  [17] 2.042759 2.040958 2.038811 2.036368 2.033685 2.030816 2.027818 2.024747
#>  [25] 2.023873 2.022988 2.021828 2.020394 2.018689 2.016717 2.014487 2.012012
#>  [33] 2.009307 2.006389 2.003279 2.000000 2.085106 2.170213 2.255319 2.340426
#>  [41] 2.425532 2.510638 2.595745 2.680851 2.765957 2.851064 2.936170 3.021277
#>  [49] 3.106383 3.191489 3.276596 3.361702 3.446809 3.531915 3.617021 3.702128
#>  [57] 3.787234 3.872340 3.957447 4.042553 4.127660 4.212766 4.297872 4.382979
#>  [65] 4.468085 4.553191 4.638298 4.723404 4.808511 4.893617 4.978723 5.063830
#>  [73] 5.148936 5.234043 5.319149 5.404255 5.489362 5.574468 5.659574 5.744681
#>  [81] 5.829787 5.914894 6.000000 6.002390 6.005114 6.008148 6.011459 6.015011
#>  [89] 6.018763 6.022669 6.026681 6.030746 6.034809 6.038814 6.041274 6.041607
#>  [97] 6.041492 6.040953 6.040019 6.038724 6.037104 6.035199 6.033049 6.030698
#> [105] 6.028189 6.025568 6.023831 6.022049 6.020129 6.018091 6.015954 6.013740
#> [113] 6.011470 6.009165 6.006845 6.004531 6.002243 6.000000 5.914894 5.829787
#> [121] 5.744681 5.659574 5.574468 5.489362 5.404255 5.319149 5.234043 5.148936
#> [129] 5.063830 4.978723 4.893617 4.808511 4.723404 4.638298 4.553191 4.468085
#> [137] 4.382979 4.297872 4.212766 4.127660 4.042553 3.957447 3.872340 3.787234
#> [145] 3.702128 3.617021 3.531915 3.446809 3.361702 3.276596 3.191489 3.106383
#> [153] 3.021277 2.936170 2.851064 2.765957 2.680851 2.595745 2.510638 2.425532
#> [161] 2.340426 2.255319 2.170213 2.085106 2.000000
#> 
plot(1:10, 1:10, type = "n")
draw_rough_rect(2, 2, 8, 7, col = "grey90",
                fill_pattern = crosshatch(padding = 0.05))
